The **Turkish Basketball First League** ([Turkish](/wiki/Turkish_language "Turkish language"): *Türkiye Basketbol Ligi*; **TBL**), is [the second-tier](/wiki/Turkish_basketball_league_system "Turkish basketball league system") level league of professional club [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") in [Turkey](/wiki/Turkey "Turkey"). The league was previously known as Turkish Basketball Second League (TB2L).

## Format and promotion and relegation

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=T%C3%BCrkiye_Basketbol_Ligi&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Format and promotion and relegation")]

There are a total of 18 teams participating in the league for the *2023-24 TBL season*. Each team plays each other in their group twice during the regular season. Team finishes at first place [promotes](/wiki/Promotion_and_relegation "Promotion and relegation") to the [top-tier](/wiki/Turkish_basketball_league_system "Turkish basketball league system") level [Turkish Basketball Super League](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_Super_League "Turkish Basketball Super League") (BSL) for the next season, teams ranked 2nd place to 9th place, compete in playoff format and winner of the playoff also promotes. The last two teams are [relegated](/wiki/Promotion_and_relegation "Promotion and relegation") to the [third-tier](/wiki/Turkish_basketball_league_system "Turkish basketball league system") level [Turkish Basketball Second League](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_Second_League "Turkish Basketball Second League").
